Sandbox_ZomboidTodo_SupplySpawnRate_tool: Controls how frequently notebooks, paper, pencils, pens, and erasers appear in containers.
Sandbox_ZomboidTodo_RequireWritingTool_t: When enabled, adding, renaming, or editing todo list entries requires a pencil or pen in the player's inventory.
Sandbox_RequireWritingTool_tooltip: When enabled, adding, renaming, or editing todo list entries requires a pencil or pen in the player's inventory.
Sandbox_ZomboidTodo_RequireEraser_toolti: When enabled, deleting todo list entries requires an eraser in the player's inventory.
Sandbox_RequireEraser_tooltip: When enabled, deleting todo list entries requires an eraser in the player's inventory.
